home.label: A short film
home.title: Sukhachi Jadoo
home.subtitle: सुखाची जादू
home.synopsis: A heartfelt short film about the small, everyday moments where happiness reveals itself — quiet kitchens, shared laughter, and the unexpected magic woven through ordinary days.

about.label: About
about.title: About the Film
about.subtitle: सुखाची जादू — The Magic of Happiness
about.storyP1: Sukhachi Jadoo is a Marathi short film that finds the extraordinary hidden inside the ordinary. It follows the small, easily-missed moments of a single day — a shared meal, a chance kindness, a familiar song heard in a new way — and asks us to notice them.
about.storyP2: The film premiered in December 2024 and has been carried forward by audiences who saw something of their own lives in it.
about.directorQuote: We made Sukhachi Jadoo because happiness, in real life, almost never arrives loudly. It is quiet, easy to miss, and we wanted to slow down long enough to honour that.
about.theme1: The quiet magic of everyday life
about.theme3: The Marathi cultural landscape — homes, kitchens, conversations
about.theme4: Noticing as a small act of love

footer.tagline: A short Marathi film about the magic hidden in everyday moments.
footer.madeWith: Made with love in Maharashtra. Premiered December 2024.
